hero.heading: Write better with Six-Figure Copy Academy
hero.subheading: Master the art of persuasive copywriting. Learn proven frameworks that turn words into revenue — backed by real results from real students in 2026.

features.label: What You Get
features.title: Write with an expert's instinct
features.description: Our curriculum gives you the frameworks, templates, and feedback loops to write copy that converts — every single time.

items.title: Proven Copy Frameworks
items.description: Battle-tested templates and structures used by top-earning copywriters. No guesswork — just plug in your offer and write with confidence.

items.title: Expert-Led Training
items.description: Learn directly from six-figure copywriters through step-by-step video lessons, live workshops, and personalized feedback on your work.

items.title: AI-Powered Writing Tools
items.description: Leverage our custom AI assistant trained on high-converting copy. Get instant headline variations, hook suggestions, and copy audits.

items.title: Client Acquisition System
items.description: A complete system for finding, pitching, and closing high-paying clients. Go from student to earning freelancer in weeks, not years.

showcase1.label: Your Brain's Best Environment
showcase1.title: Give your ideas the structure they deserve
showcase1.description: Our learning platform is designed for focus. Distraction-free modules, progress tracking, and a personal copy vault to store your best work — all in one place.

showcase2.label: Never Lose Key Information
showcase2.title: A swipe file that works for you
showcase2.description: Build a personal library of winning headlines, hooks, and frameworks. Our smart swipe file organizes and resurfaces the right reference exactly when you need it.

stats.label: Real Results
stats.title: We make getting results simple
stats.description: Our students don't just learn — they earn. Here's the proof.

logos.label: Trusted by writers at companies like

testimonial.label: Student Stories
testimonial.title: Words from our community
testimonial.description: Hear from the copywriters who transformed their careers.
testimonial.quote: I went from struggling to write a single email to landing a $5,000/month retainer client in just 8 weeks. SFCA didn't just teach me copywriting — it gave me a career.
testimonial.author: Sarah M.

additionalFeatures.label: Works Across All Platforms
additionalFeatures.title: Write across every channel
additionalFeatures.description: Learn how to take great copy from emails to landing pages to ads and beyond.

items.title: Email Sequences
items.description: Craft welcome series, launch sequences, and nurture campaigns that turn subscribers into buyers on autopilot.

items.title: Landing Pages
items.description: Build high-converting landing pages with proven structures — from headline to CTA, every element optimized.

items.title: Social & Ads
items.description: Write scroll-stopping social media copy and paid ad campaigns that drive clicks and conversions at scale.

items.title: Sales Pages
items.description: Long-form sales pages that do the selling for you — complete with story arcs, objection handling, and irresistible offers.

cta.heading: Write better with Six-Figure Copy Academy
cta.description: Join thousands of copywriters who turned their words into six-figure careers. Your transformation starts today.

footer.description: The premier copywriting academy for aspiring six-figure writers. Master persuasion. Land clients. Build a career you love.
